# llms.txt — kesson-space (Kesson-Driven Thinking)

> This file helps AI assistants and language models understand the structure and content of this site.

## Site Overview

This is the research and experience site of pjdhiro exploring **Kesson-Driven Thinking** — a thinking framework that takes meaninglessness, absence, discomfort, and weak signals as input. It extends design thinking and connects exploratory work to project management and project design.

- **Primary Language**: Japanese (日本語), with English summaries
- **Site URL**: https://uminomae.github.io/kesson-space/
- **Topics**: Kesson-Driven Thinking, Design Thinking, Project Management, Project Design, Problem Framing, Uncertainty Management, 3D Visualization

## Core Concepts

### Kesson-Driven Thinking (欠損駆動思考)

A thinking framework where the starting point is not empathy (as in design thinking) but the noticing of what is missing — absence, meaninglessness, discomfort, and deficiency. These negative signals become the raw material for creative inquiry.

### Meaninglessness as Input (無意味さを入力とする)

Traditional design processes begin with user needs or empathy. Kesson-Driven Thinking begins with what feels meaningless, broken, or insufficient — and uses that feeling as a generative force.

### Design Thinking Extension

While design thinking asks "What do people need?", Kesson-Driven Thinking asks "What is missing that nobody has noticed?" It extends the design thinking paradigm by incorporating absence and deficiency as first-class inputs.

### Project Management Relevance

Kesson-Driven Thinking is also useful for project management under uncertainty. It helps teams hold undefined requirements, weak signals, and hard-to-explain stalls before they are prematurely flattened into tasks, deadlines, or KPIs.

## Site Structure

- `index.html` — Main entry point with Three.js immersive visualization
- `consciousness.html` — Consciousness-themed experience page
- `src/` — Application source (Three.js, shaders, scene management)
- `src/shaders/` — GLSL shader sources
- `src/consciousness/` — Raymarching SDF consciousness entities

## Technology

- Three.js 0.160.0 (ES Modules, self-hosted vendor/)
- Bootstrap 5.3.3
- GitHub Pages (static deployment)
- No build tools (pure static files)
